items.title: ai-agent-architecture
items.summary: Build LLM systems you actually control. A free, open engineering book + course — from tokenization to serving your own models. Mechanisms, trade-offs, and numbers, not prompt tips
items.summary_cn: 构建您实际控制的LLM系统。一本免费、开放的工程书籍+课程--从令牌化到为您自己的模型服务。机制、权衡和数字，而不是提示提示
items.comment: 社区狂欢，实际部署成本你考虑过吗？

items.title: language-model-builder
items.summary: An educational macOS app: build and chat with a tiny language model, trained on your Mac
items.summary_cn: 教育版macOS应用程序：构建微型语言模型并与之聊天，在Mac上进行培训
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: SoftReason: A Fully Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Deductive Reasoning Architecture over High-Dimensional Perceptual Data
items.title_cn: SoftReason ：基于高维感知数据的完全可微的神经-软-符号演绎推理体系结构
items.summary: In many reasoning problems, the premises are not observed as discrete symbols, but must be inferred from high-dimensional inputs. Further, the predicate vocabulary, argument structure, and trusted evidence are supplied by a Knowledge Graph (KG), or rule definitions. Classical neuro-symbolic pipeline...
items.summary_cn: 在许多推理问题中，前提不是作为离散符号观察的，而是必须从高维输入中推断出来的。此外，谓词词汇、参数结构和可信证据由知识图（ KG ）或规则定义提供。经典的神经符号流水线...
items.comment: 监管落地对行业是双刃剑，合规成本飙升，小玩家可能被挤出市场。

items.title: Persian Pixel: A large-scale synthetic OCR dataset for Persian language
items.title_cn: Persian Pixel ：波斯语的大规模合成OCR数据集
items.summary: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for Persian remains substantially less mature than for Latin-script languages despite Persian being spoken by more than 110 million people across multiple countries. This gap arises from two fundamental challenges: the intrinsic complexity of the Perso-Arabic writ...
items.summary_cn: 尽管波斯语在多个国家被超过1.1亿人使用，但波斯语的光学字符识别（ OCR ）仍然远不如拉丁字母成熟。这一差距源于两个基本挑战：波斯-阿拉伯令状的内在复杂性...
items.comment: 政策收紧，大厂合规团队又要扩编了，创新空间还剩多少？

items.title: FMRP-LEAN: A HIPAA-Compliant AI-Augmented LIMS Architecture for End-to-End Clinical Assay Workflow Optimization
items.title_cn: FMRP-LEAN ：用于端到端临床检测工作流程优化的符合HIPAA的人工智能增强LIMS架构
items.summary: Clinical biomarker workflows in translational research settings often rely on spreadsheet-driven tracking, manual quality control (QC) reconciliation, and loosely integrated systems, resulting in limited state visibility, delayed reporting, and increased operational risk. These challenges are partic...
items.summary_cn: 转化研究环境中的临床生物标志物工作流程通常依赖于电子表格驱动的跟踪、手动质量控制（ QC ）对账和松散集成的系统，导致状态可见性有限、报告延迟和运营风险增加。这些挑战是微小的...
items.comment: 新论文发布，先别急着引用，等社区复现和讨论再说。

items.title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
items.title_cn: ServiceNow向印度银行软件专家下注4000万美元，以扩大其金融服务
items.summary: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.
items.summary_cn: ServiceNow的投资使BusinessNext成为在全球范围内扩展其人工智能银行软件的战略合作伙伴。
items.comment: 监管落地对行业是双刃剑，合规成本飙升，小玩家可能被挤出市场。

items.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
items.title_cn: 在令人震惊的季度之后， IBM坚持认为人工智能并没有杀死大型机
items.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.
items.summary_cn: 在上周IBM股价因大型机销售不佳的警告而崩盘后，这位首席执行官解释说，人工智能暂时破坏了公司的硬件预算。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
items.title_cn: 谷歌通过蓬勃发展的云业务证明其庞大的人工智能支出是合理的
items.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.
items.summary_cn: 谷歌的云业务正在蓬勃发展，因为采用其人工智能和人工智能基础设施服务的公司帮助这家科技巨头报告创纪录的利润。
items.comment: 基准测试成绩亮眼，但测试集和实际场景是两码事，别被数字忽悠。
